label: MNIST
note: Seed-axis genomes hit 0.9909, past the 99% bar. Task is tabulatable so evolution earns ~0 residual here — considered done.

label: CIFAR
note: 0.7111 single-substrate best (grammar-v2 radial). Target 0.75 near-term; classical supervised ceiling ~0.93.

label: ResNet / stacked-residual
note: Plateau at 0.948; fat-R0 law characterised. 0.95 is the next wall to break.

label: LM (cloze)
metric: cloze top-5, share of classical ceiling
note: 0.3273 top-5 = 69% of the 0.4728 classical ceiling. Goal is to close the remaining 31% to the table ceiling.
